reason: Synced the chat-workbench design spec with source_metadata_json alignment, the environment-contract fallback/order and field semantics, export fail-closed gating for missing environment contracts, and the planning-only lifecycle-chain boundary; also added a discoverability note in the skills index.
Documented chat workbench export summary persistence, Skill Tests deep-link query contract, and source tag rendering for chat-exported draft cases.
Updated the test contract notes to reflect the newly added source_metadata_json persistence coverage and the rule that environment/chain metadata stays out of free-text notes.
